summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TW TECH STORE with focus on currency conversion (USD to LKR) and admin JWT authentication. Both backend and frontend fully functional with excellent success rates.

backend_issues.notes: All 34 backend API tests passed with 100% success rate including new admin JWT authentication tests. Admin login with 'admin123' working perfectly, protected endpoints properly secured.

passed_tests: Currency Display: All prices show 'Rs.' format correctly (31 elements on homepage, 56 on products page, 2+ on product detail, 4 in cart, 4 in checkout)
Admin Login: Successfully logs in with password 'admin123' and generates JWT token
Admin Dashboard: Shows revenue as 'Rs. 9226.00' and shipping as 'Rs. 15 Flat Rate'
Admin Protected Routes: Correctly redirects to login when accessing /admin/dashboard without authentication
Admin Wrong Password: Properly rejects incorrect passwords (401 response)
Admin JWT Security: All /api/admin/* endpoints require valid JWT token in Authorization header
Admin Orders Page: Displays currency in 'Rs.' format
Admin Logout: Successfully clears token and redirects to login
Price Filter: Shows 'Rs. 0' to 'Rs. 5000' range correctly on product listing
Product Detail Page: Displays 'Rs. 2299.00' current price and 'Rs. 2499.00' original price
Shopping Cart: All prices in 'Rs.' format (item price, subtotal, total)
Checkout Page: Currency displayed correctly in 'Rs.' format
Store Frontend: Navigation, product browsing, add to cart, cart management all working
Add to Cart: Successfully adds products and updates cart counter
